scope: Exact-identity Wikimedia Commons follow-up for the 26 catalog models with no archived representative after the first quality audit.

policy.identity_rule: Select only a complete vehicle whose Commons title, description, or exact model category establishes the catalog identity. A reused name, sibling badge, generic generation photo, advertisement, detail view, or body style conflict is not enough.
policy.year_rule: Record an explicit year only when Commons metadata states a year inside the catalog range. Exact identity without a model year may still serve as a representative.
policy.resolution_rule: Keep the existing 640 by 400 minimum for raster originals.

candidates.evidence_note: Title and description identify a 1913 Chevrolet Classic Six.

rejections.reason: Exact 1914 H-4 Baby Grand, but the 600 by 400 original is below the archive's 640 pixel minimum width.
